description: Pin @aws-blocks/* versions in both package.json files and rename root package
acceptance_criteria: No "*" version strings remain for @aws-blocks/* packages in either package.json
@aws-blocks/blocks is pinned to 0.1.4 in both files
@aws-blocks/bb-realtime is pinned to 0.1.1 in both files
verification: grep -c '"*"' package.json aws-blocks/package.json should return 0 matches
findings: All version pins applied successfully. No build/test run needed as this is a metadata-only change to package.json files (version pinning and name change). The @aws-blocks packages are private/tutorial packages not available in public registries.
